chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1890 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 23.10.2025 Mr. Shamsuddin Rajper, advocate for petitioner(s) *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Through this petition, petitioner seeks directions against the respondents No.2 and 3 to decide his pending application regarding establishment and operation of van stand at Plots No.34/B, 35/B, 37/B and 38/B, Block-C Unit No.7 Latifabad Hyderabad. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner had filed an application before Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad /respondent No.2 for grant of permission to establish and operate the van stand at aforesaid plots, which is pending since 11.06.2024. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and states that application of the petitioner will be decided strictly in accordance with law within shortest period. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad/respondent No.2 to decide the application of petitioner dated 11.06.2024 within a period of 30 days from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity of hearing to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad as well as to the office of learned Additional A.G Sindh for information and compliance.

In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad/respondent No.2 to decide the application of petitioner dated 11.06.2024 within a period of 30 days from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity of hearing to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad as well as to the office of learned Additional A.G Sindh for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
